meta.title: From SAVE to PLANET
meta.message: Yorgos Lanthimos' _Bugonia_ is a remake of the cult 2003 Korean film _Save the Green Planet!_ It stars Jesse Plemons as a conspiracy theorist who kidnaps a pharma CEO (Emma Stone) he's convinced is an alien sent to destroy Earth. It also landed a Best Lead Actress nom for Stone, who apparently can't stop getting nominated. Much to my surprise, this movie was extremely my shit. It's dark and weird and funny, at all the right pitches. Where I found _Poor Things_ to be humorlessly upsetting, I found _Bugonia_ to be comfortably weird.

What a <> indicates in a text
Change one letter in <> to get a confection
A hot <> {} is actually mostly cold
Drop half of <> to get a big hot thing
